meaning: n.鍙嶅嚮,鍙嶆敾v.鍙嶆敾,鍙嶅嚮
examples: The army began its counterattack this morning.
Lascombes led his men in a counterattack against a hill overlooking the French position.
We will not attack unless we are attacked; if we are attacked, we will certainly counterattack.
Sixteen minutes later, the Italians remarkably doubled their lead with a sweeping counterattack following a Germany corner.
Everyone infringes everyone else's patents, so most companies don't sue for fear of an equally destructive counterattack.
